name: Shrimp and Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil; add shrimp, and cook for 3 minutes or until shrimp begin to turn pink. Drain well; rinse with cold water. Chill.
2. Peel and devein shrimp. Chop half of the shrimp, leaving the remaining shrimp whole. Set aside.
3. Cook noodles according to directions. Drain.
4. Cook green onions and green pepper in butter in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until tender. Add soup and next 5 ingredients. Gently stir in chopped shrimp and noodles.
5. Spoon mixture into a lightly greased shallow 2 1/2-qt. casserole. Arrange whole shrimp on top of the casserole.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
